title: Automation to copy line but modify effective date
excerpt: Hi Has anyone created any automation that will create a duplicate item with new dates once a status has been met? I’m attempting to automatically create items that represent renewals of sales for sales tracking for items…

posts.author: MarkHo (Mark Ho)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Has anyone created any automation that will create a duplicate item with new dates once a status has been met? I’m attempting to automatically create items that represent renewals of sales for sales tracking for items that renew in 6 or 12 months.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @MarkHo

Welcome to the community! To set the date to “today” (the date the status changes) you can use this custom automation:

image1480×311 10 KB

If you need to set the date to something else you might want to use the app “Set Relative Timeline” (which also sets dates) and use this automation:

image1483×404 27.6 KB
